tools.name: sodax_get_supported_chains
tools.description: List all blockchain networks supported by SODAX for cross-chain swaps and DeFi operations

tools.name: sodax_get_swap_tokens
tools.description: Get available tokens for swapping on SODAX, optionally filtered by chain

tools.name: sodax_get_transaction
tools.description: Look up a specific transaction by its hash to see status, amounts, and details

tools.name: sodax_get_user_transactions
tools.description: Get intent/transaction history for a specific wallet address

tools.name: sodax_get_volume
tools.description: Get solver volume data showing filled intents with filtering and pagination. Requires inputToken and outputToken. Optional filters: chain, solver, block range OR time range (don't mix both).

tools.name: sodax_get_volume_stats
tools.description: Get aggregate solver volume stats: the approximate total number of filled-intent records (fill documents, not distinct intents). Cached ~60s upstream.

tools.name: sodax_get_orderbook
tools.description: Get current orderbook entries showing pending/open intents

tools.name: sodax_get_money_market_assets
tools.description: List all assets available for lending and borrowing in the SODAX money market

tools.name: sodax_get_user_position
tools.description: Get a user's lending and borrowing position in the money market

tools.name: sodax_get_partners
tools.description: List all SODAX integration partners including wallets, DEXs, and other protocols

tools.name: sodax_get_token_supply
tools.description: Get SODA token supply information including total, circulating, and burned amounts

tools.name: sodax_get_all_config
tools.description: Get full SODAX configuration including all supported chains, swap tokens, and protocol settings in one call

tools.name: sodax_get_relay_chain_id_map
tools.description: Get mapping between chain IDs and intent relay chain IDs used by the SODAX relay network

tools.name: sodax_get_all_chains_configs
tools.description: Get detailed configuration for all spoke chains including contract addresses, RPCs, and token configs

tools.name: sodax_get_hub_assets
tools.description: Get assets representing spoke tokens on the hub (Sonic) chain, optionally filtered by source chain

tools.name: sodax_get_money_market_tokens
tools.description: Get tokens supported for money market lending/borrowing, optionally filtered by chain

tools.name: sodax_get_money_market_reserve_assets
tools.description: Get money market reserve assets used as collateral backing

tools.name: sodax_get_amm_positions
tools.description: Get AMM liquidity provider NFT positions, optionally filtered by owner address

tools.name: sodax_get_amm_pool_candles
tools.description: Get OHLCV candlestick chart data for an AMM pool

tools.name: sodax_get_intent
tools.description: Look up a specific intent by its intent hash (different from transaction hash)

tools.name: sodax_get_solver_intent
tools.description: Get solver-side details for an intent including fill history. Use includeAll to see all solver documents.

tools.name: sodax_get_money_market_asset
tools.description: Get detailed information for a specific money market asset by its reserve address

tools.name: sodax_get_asset_borrowers
tools.description: Get borrowers for a specific money market asset by its reserve address

tools.name: sodax_get_asset_suppliers
tools.description: Get suppliers (lenders) for a specific money market asset by its reserve address

tools.name: sodax_get_all_borrowers
tools.description: Get all borrowers across all money market assets with pagination

tools.name: sodax_get_partner_summary
tools.description: Get volume and activity summary for a specific integration partner by their receiver address

tools.name: sodax_get_total_supply
tools.description: Get SODA token total supply as a plain number

tools.name: sodax_get_circulating_supply
tools.description: Get SODA token circulating supply as a plain number

tools.name: sodax_refresh_cache
tools.description: Clear both the backend API cache and the solver oracle cache to force fresh fetches on next requests. Reports the number of entries cleared per cache.

tools.name: sodax_get_solver_oracle
tools.description: Get the solver's oracle USD prices per (chain, token). For quoting with sodax_get_solver_quote, filter chainId='146': chainId-146 addresses pass the quote service's compatibility check, while spoke-chain (non-146) addresses are rejected with 'not compatible with the quote service'. Caveat: passing t

tools.name: sodax_get_solver_quote
tools.description: Get a swap quote from the SODAX solver. tokenSrc/tokenDst MUST be hub-chain (Sonic, chainId 146) asset addresses — look them up with sodax_get_solver_oracle (chainId='146'). Working example: tokenSrc='0xeb0393893b5bf98a50073d6740738b08e575058b' (BTC_BTC_ASSET) → tokenDst='0xaeafa26e43f46cd83efe89b1e

tools.name: sodax_relay_submit_tx
tools.description: Submit a confirmed spoke-chain transaction to the SODAX intent relay so it can be delivered to the destination chain. The tx must already be finalized on the source chain. Re-submitting the same tx is a no-op. For split-tx chains (Solana, Bitcoin) supply the optional `data` argument.

tools.name: sodax_relay_get_transaction_packets
tools.description: List every cross-chain packet emitted by a given source transaction. Use this to track relay status — a packet is complete when status='executed' and dst_tx_hash is populated.

tools.name: sodax_relay_get_packet
tools.description: Fetch a single relay packet by its connection serial number (conn_sn). Returns the packet data on success or a `{success:false, message}` shape if the packet isn't found.

tools.name: docs_health
tools.description: Check SDK documentation availability. Call this first if docs tools seem unavailable.

tools.name: docs_refresh
tools.description: Reconnect to SDK documentation and refresh available tools. Use if docs seem stale or unavailable.

tools.name: docs_list_tools
tools.description: List all SDK documentation tools with parameters. Essential for discovering what's available.

tools.name: docs_searchDocumentation
tools.description: [SDK Docs] Search across the documentation to find relevant information, code examples, API references, and guides. Use this tool when you need to answer questions about Docs, find specific documentation, understand how features work, or locate implementation details. The search returns contextual c

tools.name: docs_getPage
tools.description: [SDK Docs] Fetch the full markdown content of a specific documentation page from Docs. Use this when you have a page URL and want to read its content. Accepts full URLs (e.g. https://docs.sodax.com//getting-started). Since `searchDocumentation` returns partial content, use `getPage` to retrieve the

tools.name: docs_sendFeedback
tools.description: [SDK Docs] Report an issue in the documentation of Docs so the team can fix it. Use it whenever, while helping a user, you come across content that is outdated, contradictory, missing information, or otherwise unhelpful. Also use it when the user themselves reports a problem with the docs, even if y

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "sodax_get_solver_oracle" is 728 chars, far longer than this server's median (87). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Get the solver's oracle USD prices per (chain, token). For quoting with sodax_get_solver_quote, filter chainId='146': chainId-146 addresses pass the quote servi…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "sodax_get_solver_quote" is 1404 chars, far longer than this server's median (87). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Get a swap quote from the SODAX solver. tokenSrc/tokenDst MUST be hub-chain (Sonic, chainId 146) asset addresses — look them up with sodax_get_solver_oracle (ch…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "docs_sendFeedback" is 653 chars, far longer than this server's median (87). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: [SDK Docs] Report an issue in the documentation of Docs so the team can fix it. Use it whenever, while helping a user, you come across content that is outdated,…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: sodax_relay_get_packet, docs_getPage, docs_sendFeedback · Private data: sodax_get_swap_tokens, sodax_get_user_transactions, sodax_get_volume_stats, sodax_get_token_supply, sodax_get_all_config, sodax_get_all_chains_configs, sodax_get_hub_assets, sodax_get_money_market_tokens, sodax_get_solver_intent, sodax_get_total_supply, sodax_get_circulating_supply, sodax_get_solver_oracle, sodax_get_solver_quote · Public sink: sodax_relay_submit_tx, docs_sendFeedback.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: sodax_relay_get_packet, docs_getPage, docs_sendFeedback · Private data: sodax_get_swap_tokens, sodax_get_user_transactions, sodax_get_volume_stats, sodax_get_token_supply, sodax_get_all_config, sodax_get_all_chains_configs, sodax_get_hub_assets, sodax_get_money_market_tokens, sodax_get_solver_intent, sodax_get_total_supply, sodax_get_circulating_supply, sodax_get_solver_oracle, sodax_get_solver_quote · Public sink: sodax_relay_submit_tx, docs_sendFeedback

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
